name: UBA : Suspicious Privileged Activity (Rarely Used Privilege)
notes:
Indicates that a user executed a privileged action that they were not executing recently. Observations are kept in "UBA : Recent Activities by Low Level Category and Username" map-of-sets.

The sensitivity of this event can be modified by changing the TTL (time-to-live) of the Reference Map-of-Sets for "UBA : Recent Activities by Low Level Category and Username". Increasing the TTL will reduce the sensitivity. Decreasing TTL will increase the sensitivity.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Sense
when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Privileged Activity : UBA
when all of Low Level Category is the key and all of Username is the value in all of UBA : Recent Activities by Low Level Category and Username - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Suspicious Privileged Activity (Rarely Used Privilege) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the event category for the event is one of the following Sense
AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Privileged Activity : UBA
AND NOT when all of Low Level Category is the key and all of Username is the value in all of UBA : Recent Activities by Low Level Category and Username - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Suspicious Privileged Activity (Rarely Used Privilege)
Event description: senseValue=10,senseDesc='Indicates the user has been observed performing a privileged act rarely observed from them.',usecase_id='e9726a50-9352-4eaf-ad6a-bc8eecc40c9a'
Add "userName" to Reference Map Of Sets: "UBA : Recent Activities by Low Level Category and Username" with key "category"
